examples: A glass balustrade separates the toddlers' area from the bathing hall.
On the upper floor, the bricks form the balustrade of the roof terrace.
A narrow balcony, usually having a railing or balustrade, along the outside of a building.
Then I stood on our balcony, my hands gripping the cold metal balustrade above my head.
Gorgeous art nouveau details, such as the sweeping wroughtiron balustrade on the central staircase, are the hallmark of the Tulip House Boutique Hotel Sleep 14.
